title: Dekton 48PC Packing Spacers, for Precise Alignment & Spacing | Ideal for Flooring, Tile, Cabinetry & Door Frames | Assorted Sizes for Versatile Use | Perfect for DIY & Professional Projects
availability_text: Only 14 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Precision Alignment & Spacing: Dekton 48PC Packing Spacers are designed to provide accurate and consistent alignment in a variety of applications. Whether you're installing flooring, tiling, or adjusting cabinetry, these spacers ensure perfect spacing for a professional finish.

Assorted Sizes for Versatile Use: This pack includes 48 spacers in various sizes, offering flexibility for different tasks. Whether you're working with narrow or wide gaps, these spacers provide a range of options to suit your specific needs. Perfect for flooring, door frames, windows, and more, they ensure you always have the right spacer for the job.

Durable Plastic Construction: Made from tough, high-quality plastic, Dekton Packing Spacers are built to withstand pressure without cracking or deforming. Their robust construction ensures long-lasting performance, making them ideal for repeated use in both light and heavy-duty projects.

Easy to Use for Precise Installations: The design of these packing spacers allows for quick and easy placement, ensuring hassle-free installations. Whether you're leveling a floor or aligning tiles, their user-friendly design ensures that you can achieve a clean, professional result with minimal effort.

Essential for DIY & Professional Projects: Ideal for home renovation projects as well as professional use, these packing spacers offer versatile functionality. They're essential for anyone working with tile, laminate flooring, windows, or door frames, providing the accuracy and alignment needed for high-quality installations.
description: The Dekton 48PC Packing Spacers set is an essential tool for anyone working on home improvement or professional installations. Designed to provide precise alignment and consistent spacing, these durable plastic shims are perfect for flooring, tiling, cabinetry, and more. The pack includes spacers in various sizes, ensuring versatility for different tasks, whether you're working with narrow gaps or larger spaces. Made from tough, high-quality plastic, these spacers are built to withstand pressure and offer long-lasting performance. Their user-friendly design makes them easy to use, ensuring hassle-free installations and a professional finish. Whether you're a DIY enthusiast or a professional tradesperson, the Dekton Packing Spacers provide the accuracy and precision you need for all your alignment and leveling projects. Ideal for flooring, door frames, windows, and other installation work, these spacers will help you achieve clean, even results every time.
